---
title: "Social Determinants of Respiratory Virus Outcomes"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
    engine: shiny
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(here)

# --- Dropdown options ---
cohorts <- c("Older Adults", "Adults", "Children and Adolescents",
             "Infants", "Maternally Linked Infants")
pathogens <- c("RSV", "Influenza", "COVID-19", "Overall Respiratory Virus")
phenotypes <- c("Specific", "Sensitive")

# --- Investigation lookup table ---
investigation_lookup <- tribble(
  ~cohort, ~pathogen, ~valid_investigations,

  # Older Adults
  "Older Adults", "RSV", c("Primary", "Secondary", "Sensitivity"),
  "Older Adults", "Influenza", c("Primary", "Secondary", "Sensitivity"),
  "Older Adults", "COVID-19", c("Primary", "Secondary"),
  "Older Adults", "Overall Respiratory Virus", c("Primary"),

  # Adults
  "Adults", "RSV", c("Primary"),
  "Adults", "Influenza", c("Primary"),
  "Adults", "COVID-19", c("Primary"),
  "Adults", "Overall Respiratory Virus", c("Primary"),

  # Children and adolescents
  "Children and Adolescents", "RSV", c("Primary"),
  "Children and Adolescents", "Influenza", c("Primary"),
  "Children and Adolescents", "COVID-19", c("Primary"),
  "Children and Adolescents", "Overall Respiratory Virus", c("Primary"),

  # Infants
  "Infants", "RSV", c("Primary", "Sensitivity"),
  "Infants", "Influenza", c("Primary", "Sensitivity"),
  "Infants", "COVID-19", c("Primary"),
  "Infants", "Overall Respiratory Virus", c("Primary"),

  # Maternally Linked Infants
  "Maternally Linked Infants", "RSV", c("Primary"),
  "Maternally Linked Infants", "Influenza", c("Primary"),
  "Maternally Linked Infants", "COVID-19", c("Primary"),
  "Maternally Linked Infants", "Overall Respiratory Virus", c("Primary")
)

# Resolve cache directory whether run from repo root or dashboard folder.
detect_dashboard_cache_dir <- function() {
  candidates <- unique(normalizePath(c(
    file.path(here::here(), "post_check", "supplemental", "dashboard"),
    here::here()
  ), mustWork = FALSE))

  for (dir in candidates) {
    if (length(list.files(dir, pattern = "_model_results.*\\.RData$")) > 0) {
      return(dir)
    }
  }

  file.path(here::here(), "post_check", "supplemental", "dashboard")
}

dashboard_cache_dir <- detect_dashboard_cache_dir()

# --- Persistent plot cache (entries kept until cleared manually) ---
plot_cache <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())

if (is.null(getShinyOption("cache"))) {
  shinyOptions(cache = cachem::cache_mem(max_size = 2e9))
}

load_plotlist_from_file <- function(file_path) {
  env <- new.env()
  load(file_path, envir = env)
  objs <- ls(env)

  # Case 1: list of ggplots
  list_objs <- objs[sapply(objs, function(x)
    is.list(env[[x]]) && all(sapply(env[[x]], inherits, "ggplot")))]
  if (length(list_objs) > 0) {
    return(env[[list_objs[1]]])
  }

  # Case 2: multiple standalone ggplots
  gg_objs <- objs[sapply(objs, function(x) inherits(env[[x]], "ggplot"))]
  if (length(gg_objs) > 0) {
    return(setNames(lapply(gg_objs, function(x) env[[x]]), gg_objs))
  }

  return(list())
}

get_cached_plotlist <- function(key, file_path) {
  if (!exists(key, envir = plot_cache)) {
    if (file.exists(file_path)) {
      message("Loading plot cache for: ", key)
      plot_cache[[key]] <- load_plotlist_from_file(file_path)
    } else {
      plot_cache[[key]] <- list()
    }
  }
  plot_cache[[key]]
}

clear_plot_cache <- function() {
  rm(list = ls(plot_cache), envir = plot_cache)
  invisible(gc())
}

# --- Helper: prettify plot names for dropdown ---
prettify_plot_names <- function(plot_names) {
  tibble(raw = plot_names) %>%
    mutate(
      pretty = raw %>%
        # Remove leading pathogen prefix (e.g. "rsv_")
        gsub("^[a-z]+_", "", .) %>%
        # Replace underscores with spaces
        gsub("_", " ", .) %>%
        # Capitalize first letter of each word
        tools::toTitleCase(.) %>%
        # Replace common abbreviations
        gsub("Ses", "IMD", .) %>%
        gsub("Mild", "(Mild)", .) %>%
        gsub("Severe", "(Severe)", .)
    )
}

pathogen_code <- function(pathogen_label) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    pathogen_label == "RSV" ~ "rsv",
    pathogen_label == "Influenza" ~ "flu",
    pathogen_label == "COVID-19" ~ "covid",
    pathogen_label == "Overall Respiratory Virus" ~ "overall_resp",
    TRUE ~ tolower(gsub(" ", "_", pathogen_label))
  )
}

cohort_code <- function(cohort_label) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    cohort_label == "Older Adults" ~ "older_adults",
    cohort_label == "Adults" ~ "adults",
    cohort_label == "Children and Adolescents" ~ "children_and_adolescents",
    cohort_label == "Infants" ~ "infants",
    cohort_label == "Maternally Linked Infants" ~ "infants_subgroup",
    TRUE ~ tolower(gsub(" ", "_", cohort_label))
  )
}

# Primary investigations use phenotype-specific cache files; secondary and
# sensitivity investigations always use the default (specific) routing.
get_cache_paths <- function(
    cohort,
    pathogen,
    investigation,
    phenotype = "Specific",
    further = FALSE
) {
  path <- paste0(cohort_code(cohort), "_", pathogen_code(pathogen))
  base_dir <- dashboard_cache_dir

  if (further) {
    phenotype_code <- tolower(phenotype)
    list(
      cache_file = file.path(
        base_dir,
        paste0(path, "_further_model_results_", phenotype_code, ".RData")
      ),
      cache_key = paste0(path, "_further_", phenotype_code)
    )
  } else if (investigation == "Secondary") {
    list(
      cache_file = file.path(base_dir, paste0(path, "_model_results_secondary.RData")),
      cache_key = paste0(path, "_secondary")
    )
  } else if (investigation == "Sensitivity") {
    list(
      cache_file = file.path(base_dir, paste0(path, "_model_results_sensitivity.RData")),
      cache_key = paste0(path, "_sensitivity")
    )
  } else {
    phenotype_code <- tolower(phenotype)
    list(
      cache_file = file.path(
        base_dir,
        paste0(path, "_model_results_", phenotype_code, ".RData")
      ),
      cache_key = paste0(path, "_", phenotype_code)
    )
  }
}

is_valid_model_choice <- function(model_choice, plotlist) {
  !is.null(model_choice) &&
    !identical(model_choice, "p") &&
    model_choice %in% names(plotlist)
}

resolve_model_choice <- function(model_choice, plotlist) {
  if (is_valid_model_choice(model_choice, plotlist)) {
    model_choice
  } else if (length(plotlist) > 0) {
    names(plotlist)[1]
  } else {
    NULL
  }
}

print_plot_from_list <- function(plotlist, model_choice) {
  if (length(plotlist) == 0) {
    plot.new()
    title("No cached plots available")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (model_choice %in% names(plotlist)) {
    print(plotlist[[model_choice]])
  } else if ("p" %in% names(plotlist)) {
    print(plotlist[["p"]])
  } else {
    plot.new()
    title("Plot not found in cached list")
  }
}
```

```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Social Determinants of Respiratory Virus Outcomes"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("cohort", "Select Cohort:", choices = cohorts),
      selectInput("pathogen", "Select Pathogen:", choices = pathogens),
      selectInput("investigation", "Select Investigation:", choices = "Primary"),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.investigation == 'Primary'",
        selectInput(
          "phenotype",
          "Select Phenotype:",
          choices = phenotypes,
          selected = "Specific"
        )
      ),
      selectInput(
        "model_choice",
        "Select Model / Plot:",
        choices = c("(loading)" = "p"),
        selected = "p"
      ),
      actionButton("clear_cache", "Clear Cached Plots", icon = icon("broom"))
    ),
    mainPanel(
      h4("Minimally Adjusted Model"),
      shinycssloaders::withSpinner(
        plotOutput("mainPlot", height = "500px")
      ),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.investigation == 'Primary'",
        hr(),
        h4("Fully Adjusted Model (Primary Investigations Only)"),
        shinycssloaders::withSpinner(
          plotOutput("secondPlot", height = "500px")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| context: server
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  selected_phenotype <- reactive({
    req(input$investigation)
    if (identical(input$investigation, "Primary")) {
      req(input$phenotype)
      input$phenotype
    } else {
      "Specific"
    }
  })

  base_plotlist <- reactive({
    req(input$cohort, input$pathogen, input$investigation)
    paths <- get_cache_paths(
      input$cohort,
      input$pathogen,
      input$investigation,
      selected_phenotype()
    )
    get_cached_plotlist(paths$cache_key, paths$cache_file)
  })

  further_plotlist <- reactive({
    req(input$investigation == "Primary")
    paths <- get_cache_paths(
      input$cohort,
      input$pathogen,
      input$investigation,
      selected_phenotype(),
      further = TRUE
    )
    get_cached_plotlist(paths$cache_key, paths$cache_file)
  })

  # --- Investigation dropdown (runs before outputs) ---
  observe({
    req(input$cohort, input$pathogen)

    valid <- investigation_lookup %>%
      filter(cohort == input$cohort, pathogen == input$pathogen)

    choices <- if (nrow(valid) > 0) valid$valid_investigations[[1]] else "Primary"
    selected <- if (
      !is.null(input$investigation) && input$investigation %in% choices
    ) {
      input$investigation
    } else {
      choices[1]
    }

    updateSelectInput(
      session,
      "investigation",
      choices = choices,
      selected = selected
    )
  }, priority = 1001)

  # --- Model dropdown (runs before outputs, after plotlist loads) ---
  observe({
    req(input$cohort, input$pathogen, input$investigation)
    if (identical(input$investigation, "Primary")) {
      req(input$phenotype)
    }

    plotlist <- base_plotlist()

    if (length(plotlist) > 0) {
      name_map <- prettify_plot_names(names(plotlist))
      choices <- setNames(name_map$raw, name_map$pretty)
      selected <- if (is_valid_model_choice(input$model_choice, plotlist)) {
        input$model_choice
      } else {
        name_map$raw[1]
      }

      updateSelectInput(
        session,
        "model_choice",
        choices = choices,
        selected = selected
      )
    } else {
      updateSelectInput(
        session,
        "model_choice",
        choices = c("(none)" = "p"),
        selected = "p"
      )
    }
  }, priority = 1000)

  # --- Background preload: further model + alternate phenotype ---
  observeEvent(
    list(
      input$cohort,
      input$pathogen,
      input$investigation,
      input$phenotype
    ),
    {
      req(input$cohort, input$pathogen, input$investigation)
      if (identical(input$investigation, "Primary")) {
        req(input$phenotype)
      }

      cohort_val <- isolate(input$cohort)
      pathogen_val <- isolate(input$pathogen)
      investigation_val <- isolate(input$investigation)
      phenotype_val <- isolate(selected_phenotype())

      later::later(function() {
        if (identical(investigation_val, "Primary")) {
          further_paths <- get_cache_paths(
            cohort_val,
            pathogen_val,
            investigation_val,
            phenotype_val,
            further = TRUE
          )
          get_cached_plotlist(further_paths$cache_key, further_paths$cache_file)

          other_phenotype <- setdiff(phenotypes, phenotype_val)
          if (length(other_phenotype) == 1) {
            for (further in c(FALSE, TRUE)) {
              paths <- get_cache_paths(
                cohort_val,
                pathogen_val,
                investigation_val,
                other_phenotype[1],
                further
              )
              get_cached_plotlist(paths$cache_key, paths$cache_file)
            }
          }
        }
      }, delay = 0.5)
    },
    ignoreNULL = FALSE
  )

  # --- Main plot ---
  output$mainPlot <- renderPlot({
    plotlist <- base_plotlist()
    model_choice <- resolve_model_choice(input$model_choice, plotlist)
    req(!is.null(model_choice))
    print_plot_from_list(plotlist, model_choice)
  }) %>% bindCache(
    input$cohort,
    input$pathogen,
    input$investigation,
    input$phenotype,
    input$model_choice,
    cache = "app"
  )

  # --- Secondary plot (Primary only) ---
  output$secondPlot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$investigation == "Primary")
    plotlist <- further_plotlist()
    model_choice <- resolve_model_choice(input$model_choice, plotlist)
    req(!is.null(model_choice))
    print_plot_from_list(plotlist, model_choice)
  }) %>% bindCache(
    input$cohort,
    input$pathogen,
    input$phenotype,
    input$model_choice,
    cache = "app"
  )

  observeEvent(input$clear_cache, {
    clear_plot_cache()
    app_cache <- getShinyOption("cache")
    if (!is.null(app_cache)) {
      app_cache$reset()
    }
    showNotification("Cache cleared.", type = "message")
  })

}
```

```{r}
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
